title: Backup protection
description: Verify database encryption and how this device protects its backup key.

states.browser: Protection status is verified only by the Electron desktop app.
states.unsupported: Update the desktop app to verify backup protection.
states.error: Backup protection could not be verified. Restart the desktop app and try again.

protected.summary: SQLCipher encrypts the database and backup files, while the operating system protects the key.

development.summary: SQLCipher is active, but this development session receives its key from an environment variable instead of the OS keychain.

degraded.summary: SQLCipher is active, but the operating-system key provider could not be attested.

securityNote: This verification returns protection metadata only. It never reads or exposes the backup key.

schedule.title: Scheduled encrypted snapshots
schedule.description: Keep automatic restore points in a device-managed or custom folder. Snapshots stay SQLCipher encrypted.
schedule.unsupported: Update the desktop app to configure scheduled snapshots.
schedule.lastRunFailed: The latest scheduled snapshot failed. Check the destination and try again.

errors.load: Unable to load the snapshot schedule.
errors.save: Unable to save the snapshot schedule.
errors.destination: Unable to update the snapshot folder.
errors.snapshot: Unable to create the encrypted snapshot.

cloud.title: S3-compatible cloud vault
cloud.description: Replicate each scheduled encrypted snapshot to storage managed by your business.
cloud.unsupported: Update the desktop app to configure cloud backup replication.
cloud.secureStorageUnavailable: The operating-system keychain is unavailable. Cloud credentials will not be stored until secure storage is restored.
cloud.securityNote: Credentials are sealed by this device’s operating-system keychain and are never included in backups or returned to the interface. Use a dedicated key limited to writing this bucket and prefix.

fields.pathStyleHelp: Recommended for MinIO, Cloudflare R2, and many S3-compatible providers.

errors.load: Unable to load the cloud vault configuration.
errors.save: Unable to save the cloud vault configuration.
errors.disconnect: Unable to disconnect the cloud vault.
errors.configurationInvalid: Check the endpoint, bucket, prefix, region, and credentials. Production endpoints must use HTTPS.
errors.configurationMissing: Configure the cloud vault before testing it.
errors.secureStorage: The operating-system keychain cannot protect these credentials.
errors.connection: The cloud write test failed. Check the endpoint, credentials, bucket permissions, and network connection.
errors.upload: The latest encrypted snapshot could not be copied to the cloud vault. The local snapshot is still valid.
errors.inProgress: Another cloud backup operation is still in progress.

disconnectModal.title: Disconnect cloud vault?
disconnectModal.message: This removes the sealed credentials from this device. Existing cloud objects and local snapshots are not deleted.

drill.title: Restore readiness drill
drill.description: Verify the latest encrypted snapshot without changing the live database. The result is recorded in the audit log.
drill.unsupported: Update the desktop app to run restore readiness drills.

errors.snapshotUnavailable: Create at least one encrypted snapshot before running a restore drill.
errors.failed: The latest snapshot could not be verified. Create a new snapshot and try again.

result.title: Ready to restore
result.description: The snapshot passed its integrity and tenant-data checks. The live database was not changed.
result.deltaNote: Differences are expected when data changed after the snapshot was created.
